nasb.text: For they performed the worship of their God and the service of purification, together with the singers and the gatekeepers in accordance with the command of David and of his son Solomon.

esv.text: And they performed the service of their God and the service of purification, as did the singers and the gatekeepers, according to the command of David and his son Solomon.

cnv.text: 祭司和利未人謹守他們的　神所吩咐的，謹守潔淨的禮；歌唱者和守門的也照著大衛和他的兒子所羅門的命令去行，

ccb.text: 祭司和利未人遵行上帝的吩咐，遵守洁净的礼。歌乐手和殿门守卫也遵照大卫和他儿子所罗门的命令行事。
